search_fub_person.description: Search for Follow Up Boss contacts by email, phone, or name
search_fub_person.longDescription: Search the Follow Up Boss database for person records matching the provided criteria. Returns normalized person data including contact details, stage, source, tags, and assignment information.

phone.description: Phone number to search for (can be formatted or unformatted)

name.description: Full name or partial name to search for

get_fub_person.description: Retrieve detailed information about a specific Follow Up Boss person
get_fub_person.longDescription: Get comprehensive details for a Follow Up Boss person record including email, phone, name, stage, source, tags, assigned agent, and notes.

personId.description: The Follow Up Boss person ID

create_or_update_ghl_contact.description: Create a new GoHighLevel contact or update an existing one
create_or_update_ghl_contact.longDescription: Create a new contact in GoHighLevel or update an existing contact if found by email or phone match. Returns the contact ID and indicates whether the contact was created or updated.

tags.description: Array of tags to assign to the contact

sync_fub_person_to_ghl.description: Sync a Follow Up Boss person to GoHighLevel with automatic tagging
sync_fub_person_to_ghl.longDescription: Completely synchronize a Follow Up Boss person record to GoHighLevel. Creates or updates the GHL contact, applies automatic tags based on FUB stage and source, adds a sync note, and stores the FUB person ID for reference.

personId.description: The Follow Up Boss person ID to sync

create_ghl_opportunity_from_fub_deal.description: Create a GoHighLevel opportunity from a Follow Up Boss deal
create_ghl_opportunity_from_fub_deal.longDescription: Create a new opportunity in GoHighLevel from a Follow Up Boss deal. First syncs the associated person to GHL, then creates an opportunity with the deal details. Prevents duplicate opportunities by checking for existing matches.

personId.description: The Follow Up Boss person ID (required)

dealId.description: The Follow Up Boss deal ID (optional)

health_check.description: Check the health and status of the MCP bridge service
health_check.longDescription: Verify that the FUB-GHL MCP bridge service is operational and responding correctly.
